topic: Claude Code Best Practices 2026: 15 Habits of Developers Who Ship Faster

key_points: Emphasizes importance of CLAUDE.md configuration file for project context
Describes persistent memory system in .claude/memory.md for cross-session continuity
Covers skills system for reusable procedures
Detailed explanation of hooks for automated guardrails
Discusses MCP server integration for extended capabilities
Step-by-step guide to advanced Claude Code usage
Explains optimizing workflow for specific development tasks
Covers collaborative patterns when working in teams
Discusses performance tracking and metric optimization
Provides troubleshooting tips for common issues
Comparative analysis of beginner vs advanced Claude Code patterns
Detailed guide to configuring MCP servers for domain-specific tasks
Covers integration with other AI coding tools (Cursor, Windsurf)
Discusses long-term productivity gains and metrics
Provides real-world case studies of successful implementations

stats.fact: Anthropic launched Claude Code v1.0 in November 2025
Claude Code has 5 core tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob
Average time saved using Claude Code reported as 40% of coding tasks

angles: How experienced developers structure their Claude Code projects
The 15 habits that separate junior vs senior Claude Code users
Optimizing Claude Code for specific domains (web dev, data science)
Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
